# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: multi-stage-deployment

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact-name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "built artifact content" > dist/app.txt
          echo "#!/usr/bin/env bash" > dist/deploy.sh
          echo "echo Deploying artifact" >> dist/deploy.sh
          chmod +x dist/deploy.sh

      - name: Set artifact metadata
        id: meta
        run: echo "artifact-name=build-artifacts" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist

  deploy-dev:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: artifacts

      - name: Execute deployment script
        run: |
          chmod +x artifacts/deploy.sh
          ./artifacts/deploy.sh

  deploy-prod:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-dev
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifacts

      - name: Execute production deployment script
        run: |
          chmod +x artifacts/deploy.sh
          ./artifacts/deploy.sh
